sections.title: Test Coverage Analysis — Pulso Backend
sections.content:
**Current state: zero tests exist.** No `#[cfg(test)]` modules, no `tests/` directory, nothing.

---

sections.title: Untested Functions
sections.content:
| Location | Function | Risk |
|---|---|---|
| `handlers/events.rs:14` | `create_event` | Core write path |
| `handlers/events.rs:34` | `events` | Core read path + **not even routed in main.rs** |
| `handlers/events.rs:49` | `health_check` | Trivial, but route smoke test |
| `middleware/auth.rs:15` | `require_api_key` | Auth gate — highest risk |

---

sections.title: Bug Found During Analysis
sections.content:
`GET /events` handler (`events()`) is imported in `main.rs:8` but **never added to the router**. The route is dead code right now.

---

sections.title: Gap 1 — Auth Middleware: Missing/Invalid/Valid API Key
Gap 2 — SHA-256 Hash Helper (unit test, no DB)
Gap 3 — `create_event` Handler
Gap 4 — `events` (GET) Handler
Gap 5 — Integration / End-to-End Tests
Setup Needed
sections.content:
Add to `Cargo.toml` to unlock `#[sqlx::test]` (creates an isolated test DB per test):

```toml
[dev-dependencies]
sqlx = { version = "0.9.0", features = ["runtime-tokio", "postgres", "uuid", "chrono", "migrate", "test-utils"] }
tower = "0.5"
axum-test = "17"  # or use tower's ServiceExt directly
```

---

sections.title: Priority Order
sections.content:
1. **Bug fix first**: Wire `GET /events` into the router in `main.rs`
2. **Extract `sha256_hex`** as a pure function → easiest unit tests (no DB)
3. **Auth middleware tests** — highest security risk
4. **Handler integration tests** using `#[sqlx::test]`
5. **Tenant isolation test** — critical correctness guarantee

codeBlocks.code:
[dev-dependencies]
sqlx = { version = "0.9.0", features = ["runtime-tokio", "postgres", "uuid", "chrono", "migrate", "test-utils"] }
tower = "0.5"
axum-test = "17"  # or use tower's ServiceExt directly
